fields.label: Quiz Answer Type
fields.name: quiz_answer_type
fields.instructions: Choose a single format for all questions in this quiz.

sub_fields.label: Weight (multiplier)
sub_fields.name: weight
sub_fields.instructions: Multiply the per-question score by this amount (optional).

sub_fields.label: Allow multiple selection
sub_fields.name: mc_allow_multiple
sub_fields.message: Checkboxes (multiple). If off, use radio buttons (single).

sub_fields.label: Option value
sub_fields.name: option_value
sub_fields.instructions: Optional stable value (defaults to label if empty).

sub_fields.label: Min label
sub_fields.name: min_label
sub_fields.instructions: Label shown at the left/low end of the scale (e.g. "No formal programs").

sub_fields.label: Max label
sub_fields.name: max_label
sub_fields.instructions: Label shown at the right/high end of the scale (e.g. "Comprehensive, structured programs").

fields.label: Primary Colour
fields.name: primary_colour
fields.instructions: This colour will be used for headings, primary CTA's and user answer buttons

fields.label: Secondary Colour
fields.name: secondary_colour
fields.instructions: This will be used for copy, headings and answer boxes.
